description: Aasen Sparebank provides various banking products and services in Norway. The company offers savings account, savings account for children and home purchase, pension, long-term savings, and stocks. It also provides lease financing; and mortgage, car, green, and small loans. In addition, the company offers health, group life, travel, and occupational injury insurance; and bank card, credit card, online and mobile banking services, and payment solutions. Aasen Sparebank was founded in 1862 and is based in Åsen, Norway.
